author: Renqian Luo
name: FA3 + TTT-AdamW-1ep-Freeze10 + SLOT L-BFGS25 LogitDelta History20 WarmStart Focal128 DeltaClip5 + GPTQ DAMP=0.005 + MTP + QK-Gain
blurb: FA3 (torch 2.9.1+cu128, ~91ms/step) + TTT (Test-Time Training, 1ep AdamW lr=0.001, freeze 10/11 blocks, ~276s) + SLOT eval-time tuning with L-BFGS optimizer (strong-Wolfe, max_iter=25, history_size=20, warm-start=True, delta_clip=5.0) in LOGIT SPACE (vocab=1024) + FOCAL_TOKENS=128 per sliding window + GPTQ Hessian damping factor=0.005 (vs default 0.01) for more aggressive weight error compensation + MTP(2 heads, 0.1 weight) + QK_GAIN_INIT=4.0 + Full Hessian GPTQ int6 (val-data calibration) + BigramHash(3072,112) + SoftSTE. 3-seed mean BPB: 1.00955 (seeds 1337/42/314). Competition-legal: ~276s TTT + ~292s SLOT = ~568s total (~9.5 min on 8xH100). Key innovation: Lower GPTQ Hessian damping (0.005 vs 0.01 default) reduces regularization of the Hessian matrix inversion, allowing more accurate weight error compensation during GPTQ int6 quantization. Result: improved base int6 BPB (1.1165-1.1175 vs 1.1187-1.1189 with damp=0.01), which directly translates to better final SLOT BPB. LBFGS25+FOCAL128 config unchanged from previous record.
calibration: val data (GPTQ_CALIB_VAL=1: 256 seqs x 2048 tokens from val set, ~10s vs 773s AR self-gen)
technique_summary: FA3 + TTT-AdamW-1ep-Freeze10 + SLOT L-BFGS25 LogitDelta (max_iter=25, history_size=20, warm-start, strong-Wolfe, FOCAL_TOKENS=128, delta_clip=5) + GPTQ_DAMP_FACTOR=0.005 + MTP + QK_GAIN + SoftSTE + Val-data GPTQ
